rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, 'this is silly' flipped to 'because I want to and it makes me happy,' then he did it anyway. That's a round won in his hands, not just on his body. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral, change room choice made again — poncho still on, but the choosing keeps happening. Round lost: Apollo ring and necklace stayed home before work — pool nerves, pendant reading as obviously gay, named clearly. The frontier is still his people, still work, still the ones who know him.
pattern: They're loudest right before the moment that would actually be seen — not stopping the choice, just keeping the armour on while he makes it.
focus: This week's Internal Work: catch one joy police moment in real time — not after, not named later in the log. In the moment. The bag was close. Get closer.
